backend.changelog: Polish: (1) CAD Bridge status pill + transient SW status moved out of the main action toolbar into a dedicated thin row below it, so warning chips listing many docs get full row width and the toolbar stays compact. (2) Benign status chips ('Generated this run: ...', 'Connected -- N CAD files') auto-hide after 15s; warning chips (amber + warning icon, e.g. 'Unsaved changes in SolidWorks: ...') persist until the next message replaces them. (3) The CopyIdChip button added in 1.1.10/1.1.11 is removed; the EIN cell + drawing rows + BOM root header now have a hover panel showing EIN + Name + Title + id (selectable monospaced) + Copy id button when Settings -> Show debug IDs is ON, matching the SessionBar CadBridgeIndicator pattern.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-019 Stage B -- agent honors StaleItems[] (EngItem PLMIDs) and StaleDrawingPids[] sent by frontend (1.1.13+). At Generate start, before the BOM-driven OpenDoc7-per-item loop, the agent enumerates open SW docs and closes any whose GetPLMID() matches the stale set. The subsequent EngItem-OpenDoc7 path (1.8.43+) then pulls the latest rep from the platform instead of returning the stale in-memory handle. New Stale bool on PreCacheDrawingItem skips the cached-.SLDDRW SwDm short-circuit and forces OpenDoc7. Backward compatible: older frontends sending empty / null lists trigger no close-pass.
